name: AnymeX
subtitle: Your new favourite tracking and management tool
description:
This is the official source for AnymeX.

For full details, check the GitHub repository:
https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX

apps.name: AnymeX
apps.subtitle: Multiservice tracking client
apps.versionDescription:
🆕 Changelog
🌟 Features
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/9cbd2c77) option to enable/disable hold to seek by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/ca8c2061) tracker related sorting options in library by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/3aee7dae) option to enable grainy overlay by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/100ced8e) option to switch between legacy header by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/6c0b1d32) thumbanil extractor for android and ios for local media and downloaded media by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0de1481e) tachiyomi like overscroll by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c804c2d7) implemented high performance image cropper and view from mangayomi by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/f2a19216) persistent filters on online user lists by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/8031fa9c) option to change audio engine if having issue with it by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0960e22a) option to load runtime apk from file manager by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/d7c2b841) fit to screen for tablets in manga reader, improved the ui a little bit by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/622e13dd) dynamic orientation button in player by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/f7d0a55a) bluetooth play and pause support during playback by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/6b8da893) external player support by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/3222259b) hold to seek by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/1927c08e) force refresh rate toggle by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/eb55a25a) added volume boost in player by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/118aa999) option to change video renderer of player (fixed issues or lag in some devices) by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/f36e5ace) cloudflare bypass option for extensions by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/aa44cbcf) ability to clear continue watching entities + some fixes (461) by @NITHINSPACETIME


🔧 Bug Fixes & Improvements
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/1564dcc0) proper disposal of media session and reduced media session calls by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/67a3b4e8) minor fixed related to ai picks and changed api from jikan to mal by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0989162d) fixed source icon not showing up on source selector by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/18bbc986) fixed ios media indicator misalignment bug by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/948bbe44) improved al, mal login by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/16511844) fixed downloader it was failing in most sources by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/cc84696c) unfucked manga reader, improved quite literally everything by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/693aa351) fixed runtime bridge showing up as installed due to stale state and removed discord dialog by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/4a01051d) fixed chapter mismatching when starting from recent by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/1bd75e02) fixed bad mapping of medias by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/fc8fec32) fixed blank icons by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/cbe457c7) fixed memory leak and minor optimization for player by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/2ecf43f9) replaced jikan api with mal by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/32f5e669) minor label mismatch by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/df70bd78) probably fixed the ios flash during navigation by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c411f253) fixed random page jumps in webtoon mode by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/efe6a39a) fixed all entries not getting restored from backup by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/363e7d36) icons issue fixed & incremented max line for full server title visibility by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/321b1eb0) fixed media session not showing progress progress on control centre by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/3d460769) fixed audio menu to show proper audios and proper language their by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/1341ce60) fixed ui not updating extension settings instantly by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/1e9b2847) fixed player stutter on default theme by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/aa71c053) some ui fixed here and there by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/dba2137d) fixed batch torrent not playing correct episode by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/9aa7b436) fixed excessive battery draining by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/31344347) fixed audio delay on bluetooth earphones by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/9eb8fe3b) fixed messed up icons on some places by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/3fb8a06b) fixed lag & stutter in player by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/a06a849d) fixed slider conflict by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/77e4b56e) fixed default playback speed not persisting by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/67971f62) fixed mal issue where manga and anime were mismatching by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/cf07c064) fixed duplicate entry in libraries by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/475dc143) fixed an ui issue of bad card sizes on auto grid by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/2f33a6f3) fixed imports and tag duplicate for hero by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0e47454b) fixed the leftover process on desktop platforms after closing the app by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/83c49070) fixed images not loading up on search for some sources by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/46fd2c7b) fixed language selection for extensions by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/097ca97a) fixed issues with player states when switching streams by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/ddd0c8c9) decoder toggle not switching to hw+ by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/ee6b8eef) fixed minor ui issue with header by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/66b53108) minor error fix on home screen by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0f512a25) feat bugs begone (475) by @Rieversed


🔧 Refactors
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/a152dce3) minor cleanups by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c037ad4b) measures for app crashes or b/w screen by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/04efeaf8) refactored the logger a little and added a flag for init by @RyanYuuki


🎨 Style Changes
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/b257ba06) organized theme settings page by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/e41ba9c6) fixed broken dimensions of wrong title modal cards by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/ee3a2d98) added a more ux friendly selector for source by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/53fcdb2c) ui adjustment for overscroll widget by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/505a3093) minor ui changes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/6701bd44) ui changes and fixes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/8b1a8853) minor ui changes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/f07249df) revamped extension screen by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c901b98d) big carousel ui changes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/92f820b0) orange marker size fix by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/9e79e088) m3 expressive slider for player and settings by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/a3ca0aa7) default gesture indicator ui change by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/4df19b09) header ui changes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/64047797) navbar ui changes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/32e74a25) improved server selector by @RyanYuuki


🚀 Performance Improvements
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/ee1f1962) switched from saving thumbnail as base64 into db to as a asset in cache by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/9ed1c1bc) improved page switch performance by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/dd14f741) player performance, audio desync fixed for android by @RyanYuuki


🧹 Chores & Documentation
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/b133803b) bump version to v3.1.0 (minor release) by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/495de9f5) attempt to fix build error by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c7d37104) fps meter for debug by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/b7514b5e) dep conflict fix by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/f8d46e21) fixed dependency override missing core lib overrides by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/81786121) attempt to fix both windows and ios error by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0b014428) windows build issue fixed by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/28ce2932) fixed ios build issue by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c4da3b28) updated flutter and fixed the iconly issue with local dep by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0517f1f4) update sideloading source by @ghost


![Total Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/total?style=for-the-badge&label=TOTAL%20DOWNLOADS&labelColor=black&color=white) ![Current Release](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/v3.1.0/total?style=for-the-badge&label=CURRENT%20RELEASE&labelColor=black&color=white)
apps.localizedDescription: AnymeX is a multiservice tracking client, with AniList, MyAnimeList & Simkl support!
